---
title: 更改状态
description: /env/changeStatusItem、/env/changeStatus
---
import { PUT } from '@/components/RequestTag';

## 变量项

<PUT>/env/changeStatusItem</PUT>

### 请求

<TypeTable
  type={{
    id: {
      description: '唯一标识',
      type: 'number | number[]',
      required: true,
    },
    enable: {
      description: '状态',
      typeDescription: '1 启用，0 禁用',
      type: 'number<0 | 1>',
      required: true,
    },
  }}
/>

## 变量组

<PUT>/env/changeStatus</PUT>

### 请求

<TypeTable
  type={{
    id: {
      description: '唯一标识',
      type: 'number | number[]',
      required: true,
    },
    enable: {
      description: '状态',
      typeDescription: '1 启用，0 禁用',
      type: 'number<0 | 1>',
      required: true,
    },
  }}
/>
